meaning: n.刻度,衡量,比例,数值范围,比例尺,天平,等级vt.依比例决定,攀登,测量vi.剥落,生水垢,重,攀登,衡量
examples: Many practitioners have a sliding scale of fees.
The scale of the fighting is almost unimaginable.
This was disaster on a cosmic scale.
The Internet is making it easier for small-scale African entrepreneurs to sell farm goods in Europe.
Its scale and sheer size as a natural feature is what makes it so awesome.
